contents: From HoTT Require Import Basics Types Truncations.Core.
From HoTT Require Import Basics Types Truncations.Core.

(** * Pushouts of abelian groups. *)

(** The pushout of two morphisms [f : A $-> B] and [g : A $-> C] is constructed as the quotient of the biproduct [B + C] by the image of [f - g]. Since this image comes up repeatedly, we name it. *)

Definition ab_pushout_subgroup {A B C : AbGroup} (f : A $-> B) (g : A $-> C)
  : Subgroup (ab_biprod B C)
  := grp_image (ab_biprod_corec (ab_homo_negation $o f) g).

hypotheses.type: b o f == c o g
b o f == c o g
b o f == c o g

goals.conclusion:
forall n : ab_biprod B C,
{|
  normalsubgroup_subgroup := ab_pushout_subgroup f g;
  normalsubgroup_isnormal :=
    isnormal_ab_subgroup (ab_biprod B C) (ab_pushout_subgroup f g)
|} n -> ?f n = 0

hypotheses.type: b o f == c o g
b o f == c o g

  normalsubgroup_isnormal :=
    isnormal_ab_subgroup (ab_biprod B C) (ab_pushout_subgroup f g)
|} n -> ab_biprod_rec b c n = 0

contents: intros [b [c p]]; exact (ab_pushout_rec b c p).

Definition ab_pushout_inl {A B C : AbGroup} {f : A $-> B} {g : A $-> C}
  : B $-> ab_pushout f g := grp_quotient_map $o grp_prod_inl.

Definition ab_pushout_inr {A B C : AbGroup} {f : A $-> B} {g : A $-> C}
  : C $-> ab_pushout f g := grp_quotient_map $o grp_prod_inr.

Proposition ab_pushout_commsq {A B C : AbGroup} {f : A $-> B} {g : A $-> C}
  : (@ab_pushout_inl A B C f g) $o f == ab_pushout_inr $o g.

goals.conclusion:
class_of (fun x y : B * C => Tr (-1) {x0 : A & (- f x0, g x0) = - x + y})
  (f a, group_unit) =
class_of (fun x y : B * C => Tr (-1) {x0 : A & (- f x0, g x0) = - x + y})
  (group_unit, g a)

ab_biprod_corec (ab_homo_negation $o f) g a =
- (f a, group_unit) + (group_unit, g a)

contents: (** A map out of the pushout induces itself after restricting along the inclusions. *)

goals.conclusion:
ab_pushout_rec (phi $o ab_pushout_inl) (phi $o ab_pushout_inr)
  (fun a : A => ap phi (ab_pushout_commsq a)) =
phi

ab_pushout_rec (phi $o ab_pushout_inl) (phi $o ab_pushout_inr)
  (fun a : A => ap phi (ab_pushout_commsq a)) =
phi

(equiv_quotient_abgroup_ump (ab_pushout_subgroup f g) Y)^-1%equiv
  (ab_pushout_rec (phi $o ab_pushout_inl) (phi $o ab_pushout_inr)
     (fun a : A => ap phi (ab_pushout_commsq a))) =
(equiv_quotient_abgroup_ump (ab_pushout_subgroup f g) Y)^-1%equiv phi

((equiv_quotient_abgroup_ump (ab_pushout_subgroup f g) Y)^-1%equiv
   (ab_pushout_rec (phi $o ab_pushout_inl) (phi $o ab_pushout_inr)
      (fun a : A => ap phi (ab_pushout_commsq a)))).1 =
((equiv_quotient_abgroup_ump (ab_pushout_subgroup f g) Y)^-1%equiv phi).1

ab_biprod_rec (phi $o ab_pushout_inl) (phi $o ab_pushout_inr) =
((equiv_quotient_abgroup_ump (ab_pushout_subgroup f g) Y)^-1%equiv phi).1

ab_biprod_rec (phi $o ab_pushout_inl) (phi $o ab_pushout_inr) bc =
((equiv_quotient_abgroup_ump (ab_pushout_subgroup f g) Y)^-1%equiv phi).1 bc

contents: (** Restricting [ab_pushout_rec] along [ab_pushout_inl] recovers the left inducing map. *)

Lemma ab_pushout_rec_beta_left {A B C Y : AbGroup}
            (f : A $-> B) (g : A $-> C)
            (l : B $-> Y) (r : C $-> Y) (p : l o f == r o g)
  : ab_pushout_rec l r p $o ab_pushout_inl == l.

goals.conclusion: ab_pushout_rec l r p $o ab_pushout_inl == l

hypotheses.type: l o f == r o g

goals.conclusion: ab_pushout_rec l r p $o ab_pushout_inl == l

hypotheses.type: l o f == r o g

goals.conclusion: l x + r group_unit = l x

hypotheses.type: l o f == r o g
l o f == r o g

o (fun phi : ab_pushout f g $-> Y =>

idmap

o ab_pushout_rec_uncurried f g Y == idmap

transport
  (fun b0 : B $-> Y =>
   {c0 : C $-> Y & (fun x : A => b0 (f x)) == (fun x : A => c0 (g x))})
  ?p
  (ab_pushout_rec_uncurried f g Y (b; c; p) $o ab_pushout_inl;

  fun a : A =>
  ap (ab_pushout_rec_uncurried f g Y (b; c; p)) (ab_pushout_commsq a)).2 =
(b; c; p).2

goals.conclusion:
transport
  (fun b0 : B $-> Y =>
   {c0 : C $-> Y & (fun x : A => b0 (f x)) == (fun x : A => c0 (g x))})
  (let X := equiv_fun equiv_path_grouphomomorphism in
   X
     ((fun x : B =>
       ap (fun k : Y => b x + k) (grp_homo_unit c) @ right_identity (b x)
       :
       (ab_pushout_rec_uncurried f g Y (b; c; p) $o ab_pushout_inl;
       ab_pushout_rec_uncurried f g Y (b; c; p) $o ab_pushout_inr;
       fun a : A =>
       ap (ab_pushout_rec_uncurried f g Y (b; c; p)) (ab_pushout_commsq a)).1
         x =
       (b; c; p).1 x)
      :
      (ab_pushout_rec_uncurried f g Y (b; c; p) $o ab_pushout_inl;
      ab_pushout_rec_uncurried f g Y (b; c; p) $o ab_pushout_inr;
      fun a : A =>
      ap (ab_pushout_rec_uncurried f g Y (b; c; p)) (ab_pushout_commsq a)).1 ==
      (b; c; p).1))
  (ab_pushout_rec_uncurried f g Y (b; c; p) $o ab_pushout_inl;
  ab_pushout_rec_uncurried f g Y (b; c; p) $o ab_pushout_inr;
  fun a : A =>
  ap (ab_pushout_rec_uncurried f g Y (b; c; p)) (ab_pushout_commsq a)).2 =
(b; c; p).2

Definition path_ab_pushout `{Univalence} {A B C : AbGroup} (f : A $-> B) (g : A $-> C)
           (bc0 bc1 : ab_biprod B C)
  : @in_cosetL (ab_biprod B C) (ab_pushout_subgroup f g) bc0 bc1
               <~> (grp_quotient_map bc0 = grp_quotient_map bc1 :> ab_pushout f g).

goals.conclusion:
in_cosetL (ab_pushout_subgroup f g) bc0 bc1 <~>
grp_quotient_map bc0 = grp_quotient_map bc1

in_cosetL (ab_pushout_subgroup f g) bc0 bc1 <~>
grp_quotient_map bc0 = grp_quotient_map bc1

contents: (** The pushout of an embedding is an embedding. *)

goals.conclusion: ab_pushout_inl c0 = ab_pushout_inl c1 -> c0 = c1

contents: nrefine (_ o (path_ab_pushout f g (grp_prod_inl c0) (grp_prod_inl c1))^-1%equiv).

c0 = c1

{x : A &
ab_biprod_corec (ab_homo_negation $o f) g x =
- grp_prod_inl c0 + grp_prod_inl c1} -> c0 = c1

(- f a, g a) = (- c0 + c1, - group_unit + group_unit)

Definition functor_ab_pushout {A A' B B' C C' : AbGroup}
           (f : A $-> B) (f' : A' $-> B')
           (g : A $-> C) (g' : A' $-> C')
           (alpha : A $-> A') (beta : B $-> B') (gamma : C $-> C')
           (h : beta $o f == f' $o alpha) (k : g' $o alpha == gamma $o g)
  : ab_pushout f g $-> ab_pushout f' g'.

goals.conclusion: ab_pushout f g $-> ab_pushout f' g'
ab_pushout f g $-> ab_pushout f' g'
ab_pushout_inl $o beta o f == ab_pushout_inr $o gamma o g

contents: refine (ap ab_pushout_inl (h a) @ _ @ ap ab_pushout_inr (k a)).

goals.conclusion: ab_pushout_inl ((f' $o alpha) a) = ab_pushout_inr ((g' $o alpha) a)

contents:
(** ** Properties of pushouts of maps *)

(** The pushout of an epimorphism is an epimorphism. *)
(* To find a preimage of [x], we may first choose a representative [x']. *)
strip_truncations; destruct x' as [[b c] p].
(* Now [x] = [b + c] in the quotient. We find a preimage of [a]. *)
